title: Hoofdstuk 9 - Lijsten Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Unordered en ordered lists met list items.

questions.prompt: Which tag creates a bulleted list?

byOptionId.ul: Correct â€” <ul> creates an unordered (bulleted) list.
byOptionId.ol: Incorrect â€” <ol> creates a numbered list.
byOptionId.li: Incorrect â€” <li> is a list item tag used inside <ul> or <ol>.
byOptionId.list: Incorrect â€” <list> is not a valid HTML element.

questions.prompt: Which tag wraps each list item?

explanations.overview: Use <li> inside <ul> or <ol> for each item.

byOptionId.li: Correct â€” <li> wraps each list item inside <ul> or <ol>.
byOptionId.p:
Incorrect â€”

is for paragraphs, not list items.
byOptionId.div: Incorrect â€” <div> may contain list elements but <li> is the semantic list item.
byOptionId.span: Incorrect â€” <span> is inline and not a list item wrapper.
